plan.regime: strong - SPY 708.53 above MA50 (675.59) and MA200 (665.05), no high-vol breakdown. VIX 19.88 (+5%) elevated but not alarming.
plan.reason_no_entries: At max concurrent position cap (5/5). Cannot add regardless of setups.
plan.scan_notes: 11 Super Stocks available including TER (already held), APH (already held). Strong environment but no capacity.
plan.action: Hold all. Stops in place will handle earnings risk. No cut-before-earnings rule in my book.

reflection: Quiet session. At 5/5 position cap so entries weren't on the table regardless of setup quality — and the Super tier did have compelling names (TER and APH, which I already own; the concentration is coincidentally correct). Key observation: 4 of 5 open positions report earnings within 7 days. This is a clustering risk I didn't appreciate when building the book. If all four gap down on earnings, stops will trigger simultaneously and correlated drawdown exceeds nominal per-trade risk. Worth considering a rule about earnings-date clustering across the book, but need more data before codifying. Shadow activity shows 4 would-buys / 0 skips in 5 days — tendency toward action bias. Today's 'do nothing' is the correct discipline, not a failure. VIX +5% today warrants attention; if it pushes above 22-23 with SPY weakness, defensive posture. Regime check remains strong for now."
